mapper.select:
/* selectTplnitListByVhplnkyList */ SELECT /* TPIT.* */ TPIT.COMPKEY , TPIT.VHPLNKY , TPIT.VHPLNIT , TPIT.SHTRPTY , TPIT.WAREKEY , TPIT.DESTORD , TPIT.CUSTKEY , TPIT.DESTKEY , TPIT.SHTRSTS , TPIT.OWNERKY , TPIT.SKUMKEY , TPIT.SKUDESC , TPIT.SKUSKEY , TPIT.SOITQTY , TPIT.TRITQTY , TPIT.SUOMKEY , TPIT.TRUNTYP , TPIT.TRUNPID , TPIT.SAATN01 , TPIT.SAATN02 , TPIT.SAATN03 , TPIT.SAATN04 , TPIT.SAATN05 , TPIT.SAATC01 , TPIT.SAATC02 , TPIT.SAATC03 , TPIT.SAATC04 , TPIT.SAATC05 , TPIT.SAATC06
, MIN(TPIT.SAATC10) as SAATC10MIN , MAX(TPIT.SAATC10) as SAATC10MAX , MIN(TPIT.SAATC05) as SAATC05MIN
, TPIT.SAATC07 , TPIT.SAATC08 , TPIT.SAATC09 , TPIT.SAATC10
, TPIT.RETODYN , TPIT.REPITDT , TPIT.REPITTM , TPIT.RSNCODE , TPIT.RSNREMK , TPIT.COPODKY , TPIT.COPODIT , TPIT.COOUTKY , TPIT.COOUTIT , TPIT.OERETKY , TPIT.OERETIT , TPIT.EOASNKY , TPIT.EOASNIT , TPIT.RCVDCKY , TPIT.RCVDCIT , TPIT.REFSODC , TPIT.REFSOIT , TPIT.REFDNDC , TPIT.REFDNIT , TPIT.REFSDDC , TPIT.REFSDIT , fn_com_todate(TPIT.CREDATE) as CREDATE , fn_com_totime(TPIT.CRETIME) as CRETIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TPIT.CREUSER) as CREUSER , fn_com_todate(TPIT.LMODATE) as LMODATE , fn_com_totime(TPIT.LMOTIME) as LMOTIME , fn_sy_usernam(COMPKEY, TPIT.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER
, IT.DENAMLC, IT.DENAMKO, IT.DENAMEN , IT2.WANAMLC, IT2.WHNAMKO, IT2.WANAMEN , PTN.PTNAMLC, PTN.PTADDR1, PTN.PTADDR2, PTN.PTADDR3
FROM TPLNIT TPIT
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DEST.COMPKEY as COMPKEY2, DEST.DESTKEY as DESTKEY2, DEST.DENAMLC, DEST.DENAMKO, DEST.DENAMEN FROM MDESMA DEST ) IT ON TPIT.COMPKEY = IT.COMPKEY2 AND TPIT.DESTKEY = IT.DESTKEY2
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DEST.COMPKEY as COMPKEY3, DEST.DESTKEY as DESTKEY3, DEST.DENAMLC as WANAMLC, DEST.DENAMKO as WHNAMKO, DEST.DENAMEN as WANAMEN FROM MDESMA DEST ) IT2 ON TPIT.COMPKEY = IT2.COMPKEY3 AND TPIT.WAREKEY = IT2.DESTKEY3
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT PTN.PTNRKEY, PTN.PTNAMLC, PTN.PTADDR1, PTN.PTADDR2, PTN.PTADDR3, PTN.COMPKEY as COMPKEY4 FROM MPTNMA PTN ) PTN ON TPIT.COMPKEY = PTN.COMPKEY4 AND TPIT.CUSTKEY = PTN.PTNRKEY
WHERE 1=1 AND COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND VHPLNKY IN (
#{item}
)
GROUP BY TPIT.SAATC06
ORDER BY FIELD(SHTRPTY, 'START', 'ARRIVAL', 'END'), VHPLNIT ASC , DESTKEY ASC , DESTORD ASC , SAATC10 ASC
mapper.insert:
insert into TVHENT ( COMPKEY, WAREKEY, VHPLNKY, ENTUSER, ENTRQDT, ENTRQTM, ENTEPDT, ENTEPTM,
CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey}, #{warekey}, #{vhplnky}, #{userData.useract},
to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{entepdt}, #{enteptm},
to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW(), 'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} )

insert into TPLFIT ( COMPKEY, VHPLNKY, CUSTKEY, DESTKEY, FTFTKNO, HOTAKTY,
SIGSVIP, SIGFLPH, SIGFLNM, PICSVIP, PICFLPH, PICFLNM,
trnmemo, retmemo,
CREUSER )
values
( #{userData.compkey}, #{vhplnky}, #{custkey}, #{destkey}, FN_TM_FTFTKNO(), #{hotakty},
#{sigsvip}, #{sigflph}, #{sigflnm}, #{picsvip}, #{picflph}, #{picflnm},
#{trnmemo}, #{retmemo},
#{userData.useract} )

insert into TVLOHI ( COMPKEY, VHPLNKY, VHLOGSQ, WAREKEY, SHTRPTY, REPITDT, REPITTM, VHLOLAT, VHLOLON,
CREUSER ) values ( #{userData.compkey}, #{vhplnky}, FN_TM_VHLOGSQ(), #{warekey}, #{shtrpty}, #{repitdt}, #{repittm},
#{vhlolat}, #{vhlolon},
#{userData.useract} )
mapper.select: SELECT SHTRTKY, SHTRTNM, VEHICKY, POSTDAT, VHCSNAM, COMCDTX, SHTRSTS, LASTTIM, VCHRANK, VCIRANK FROM ( SELECT TR.SHTRTKY, TR.SHTRTNM , TS.VEHICKY, TV.VHCSNAM, TP.POSTDAT, TP.VHPDATE, TP.COMCDTX, TP.SHTRSTS , TO_CHAR(TP.LASTTIM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as LASTTIM, TP.VCHRANK, TP.VCIRANK, TP.VHPLNKY FROM TSHRHD TR INNER JOIN TSHRVH TS on TR.COMPKEY = TS.COMPKEY AND TR.WAREKEY = TS.WAREKEY AND TR.SHTRTKY = TS.SHTRTKY INNER JOIN TVHCMA TV on TR.COMPKEY = TV.COMPKEY AND TR.WAREKEY = TV.WAREKEY AND TS.VEHICKY = TV.VEHICKY INNER JOIN ( SELECT TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY, TH.VEHICKY, TH.POSTDAT, TH.VHPDATE, TH.VHPLNKY , RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY TH.VEHICKY ORDER BY CONCAT(TH.VHPDATE, TH.VHPTIME) DESC ) as VCHRANK , VC.COMCDOR, VC.COMCDTX, TI.SHTRSTS , RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY TH.VHPLNKY ORDER BY VC.COMCDOR DESC) as VCIRANK , MAX( GREATEST( CONCAT(TH.STPITDT, TH.STPITTM) , CONCAT(TH.TRFINDT, TH.TRFINTM), CONCAT(TI.REPITDT, TI.REPITTM) ) ) AS LASTTIM FROM TPLNHD TH INNER JOIN TPLNIT TI ON TH.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY AND TH.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN V_MCODEM VC ON TI.COMPKEY = VC.COMPKEY AND VC.COMCDKY = 'SHTRSTS' AND VC.ACTYN = 'Y' AND TI.SHTRSTS = VC.COMCDVL WHERE TH.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TH.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TH.VHPDATE = #{vhpdate} AND TH.SHTRTKY = #{shtrtky} GROUP BY TH.COMPKEY, TH.WAREKEY, TH.VEHICKY, TH.POSTDAT, TH.VHPDATE, TH.VHPLNKY, VC.COMCDOR, VC.COMCDTX, TI.SHTRSTS ) TP on TR.COMPKEY = TP.COMPKEY AND TR.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND TV.VEHICKY = TP.VEHICKY WHERE TR.COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND TR.WAREKEY = #{warekey} AND TP.VHPDATE = #{vhpdate} ) AA WHERE 1 = 1 AND AA.VCHRANK = 1 AND AA.VCIRANK = 1

SELECT COMPKEY , PTNRKEY , DESTKEY , DENAMLC , DENATCD , DENAMKO , DENAMEN , DEADDR1 , DEADDR2 , DEADDR3 , DEPOSCD , DESTLAT , DESTLON , DEUSEYN FROM MDESMA WHERE 1=1 AND COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey}
AND PTNRKEY = #{warekey} AND DEUSEYN = 'Y'

SELECT COMPKEY , WAREKEY , OWNERKY , SKUMKEY , SKUDESC , SKUTYPE , CUSKUKY , CUSKUNM , VDSKUKY , VDSKUNM , SKUSKEY , SKUSDSC , VENDKEY , PACKKEY , TRUNTYP , PROPQTY , MINIQTY , SALFQTY FROM MSKUWC SKU WHERE COMPKEY = #{userData.compkey} AND OWNERKY = #{userData.ownerky}
AND VENDKEY = #{userData.ptnrkey}
select FN_TM_VHPLNKY() as 'vhplnky'
select FN_OM_COPODKY() as 'copodky'
select FN_WM_EOASNKY() as 'eoasnky'
